articles.description: All the latest from the day's Premier League news conferences including Pep Guardiola and Mikel Arteta.
articles.title: Premier League news conferences: Pep Guardiola, Mikel Arteta & Arne Slot coming up

articles.description: When Unai Emery arrived at Aston Villa he declared he wanted to win trophies. He is now just a game away from silverware after a crushing Europa League semi-final win against Nottingham Forest.
articles.title: Aston Villa ready to end 30-year trophy drought after reaching Europa League final

articles.description: Crystal Palace desperately did not want to be in the Conference League - now they are one game from winning it and creating more club history and a "perfect" finale for boss Oliver Glasner.
articles.title: Crystal Palace: Eagles on verge of 'unbelievable' glory after reaching Conference League final

articles.description: Chris Sutton takes on world champion boxer Fabio Wardley plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for this weekend's fixtures.
articles.title: Premier League predictions: Chris Sutton v world champion boxer Fabio Wardley - & AI

articles.description: Why Sunday's Premier League game between West Ham and Arsenal could be viewed as a nightmare for Tottenham - whatever the result.
articles.title: Why Spurs fans face Arsenal dilemma in Premier League over the weekend

articles.description: Frank Warren writes in his BBC Sport column about how hard it is to promote both Fabio Wardley and Daniel Dubois for their heavyweight world title fight.
articles.title: Wardley vs Dubois: Frank Warren on being in both corners for world title fight

articles.description: England all-rounder Freya Kemp says she did not consider retirement or continuing her career solely as a batter during her recent injury woes.
articles.title: England vs New Zealand: Freya Kemp's love of bowling did not wane during injury woes

articles.description: Follow live text updates and listen to BBC radio commentaries from nine games across Division 1 and 2 of the County Championship.
articles.title: County Championship cricket LIVE: Ben Stokes & Harry Brook in action - scores, radio commentary & updates

articles.description: Former England captain Wayne Rooney says it is "mind-boggling" that Trent Alexander-Arnold was left out of Thomas Tuchel's final squad before the World Cup.
articles.title: Trent Alexander-Arnold England omission 'mind-boggling' - Wayne Rooney

articles.description: Hearts could win a first top-flight title since 1960 on Wednesday - but there is plenty of football to be played before then. Here is what to expect in the Scottish Premiership.
articles.title: Premiership title race: What next as Hearts close on title?
